differential_diagnoses: Metastatic bacterial endophthalmitis with disseminated abscesses
Disseminated fungal infection (e.g., Blastomycosis or Coccidioidomycosis)
Systemic malignancy with paraneoplastic or metastatic involvement
next_steps: Urgent vitreous tap and biopsy for culture and cytology
CT-guided biopsy of the hepatic or pulmonary lesions
Transesophageal echocardiography to rule out occult endocarditis
Specialized laboratory testing for B. pseudomallei (e.g., Ashdown agar culture)
Ophthalmology consultation for drainage/debridement of the right eye
Discontinuation of empirical antibiotics if cultures are negative, targeting specific pathogen once identified
